Colorado Day Camps

Mountain Explorers Day Camp

A week of hiking, climbing, and paddling for kids who love the outdoors.

Ages 6-12 $425 per week June 9-13, 2026 Boulder, Colorado Register now

Junior Rangers Day Camp

Trail exploration, wildlife tracking, and campfire skills for older kids.

Ages 8-14 $450 per week July 7-11, 2026 Golden, Colorado Enroll here

Looking for something for older teens? Ask about our leadership program for Ages 15-17.
